Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> This conflicts with some of the other nodemap patches in flight, and would probably be better to merge into that series to avoid landing problems.

Agreed. Currently, this patch conflicts with #57096, and it would be great if it were rebased on top of #57096, as its testing is comparatively heavy compared to this one. The conflict should be minor (a function was added in "nodemap_lproc.c").

Other than that, the patch looks good, and I've tested it successfully on my local machine. For cleanup, there are a few "procfs" occurrences as variable names and comments that can be search/replaced to "debugfs".

parents.subject: LU-930 man: add proper documentation for replace_nids command

commit.subject: LU-8066 nodemap: migrate to debugfs
commit.message:
LU-8066 nodemap: migrate to debugfs

The nodemap interface in proc is for administration purposes only
so we can safely move it to debugfs.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Change-Id: I0797bb79896ae5d9fa3bf9088b97b10505762565
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
